name: instacart / General workflow 864
task: Add eleven produce items from Aldi, including 1 pack of blueberry, 6 bananas, 1 grape tomato, 1 roma tomato, 1 cilantro, to my cart and have it delivered tomorrow between 10am and 1pm to the default address.
goal_pattern: Add eleven produce items from Aldi, including 1 pack of blueberry, 6 bananas, 1 grape tomato, 1 roma tomato, 1 cilantro, to my cart and have it delivered tomorrow between 10am and 1pm to the default address.

applicability.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
applicability.when_not_to_use: Do not use if the current task asks for a different flow or page area.

steps.selection_rule: Choose the current visible candidate whose label, role, or nearby text best matches the target description.
steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.
